name: Apple Blueberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Add apples, blueberries, and lemon juice; toss to coat the fruit.
3. Turn into pastry lined 9-inch pie plate.
4. Dot with margarine.
5. Add top crust; seal and flute edge.
6. Bake in a 425 degree oven until crust is browned and filling is bubbly.
